style_label_catalog.balanced_matchup: Saved identities do not create a clear descriptive mismatch.
style_label_catalog.defense_resistance: Saved defensive identity profiles as the clearer descriptive side.
style_label_catalog.high_variance_setup: At least one capsule carries high-variance context.
style_label_catalog.insufficient_data: Saved artifacts do not contain enough capsule context for the label.
style_label_catalog.offense_advantage: Saved offensive identity profiles ahead of opposing defensive resistance.
style_label_catalog.pace_drag: Saved pace or scoring context points downward descriptively.
style_label_catalog.pace_push: Saved pace or scoring context points upward descriptively.
style_label_catalog.profile_mismatch: Favorite/underdog or unit identities differ meaningfully.
style_label_catalog.strength_on_strength: Both sides surface credible saved strengths in the same interaction.
style_label_catalog.weakness_on_weakness: Neither side surfaces a clear saved strength in the interaction.
